message.body: hi
good evening.
Is this a C3 hack?
y'know, i didn't even really notice but yeah
it has been over the weekend usually
"there is a possibility that something might happen"
I really should get back to building puzzle levels.
not smw
I don't want my hack to end up on the pile of inferi and strugglez.
Sup @xhf01x RawkOut foxyma10EbiPeace RawkOut foxyma10EbiPeace
hey belle
hello how are you ?
if you make Kruela 3, see you in 10 years.
did you like yoshi’s island snes ?
so you're saying if Covid 2 happens, we'll suddenly have a bunch of puzzle hacks Kapp
I did finish Silksong recently, so maybe I'll have more smw time now.
gl good romhack
there's lava, there are rocks around you -- basically a cave.
CircleFriendo is just wearing you down mentally in a war of attrition
if you're short by a few frames, you can always do 1/1 swimming Kapp
Evening @dacin FutureMan RawkOut foxyma10EbiPeace
we should add that to the stupid mario/luigi gimmicks: luigi automatically does 1/1 swimming at 17 speed.
good evening redseven77.
gg orb
what we learned today: If HF gets stuck, just talk about 1/1 swimming.
what is 1/1 swimming?
is it armageddon
oh, so your average speed per frame is a tiny bit faster.  neat!
good
remind me not to try armageddon again
oooh I remember...
at least one person sent me a message about that.
Yooo @thebiob good evening RawkOut RawkOut DinoDance
hi o/
it sure sounds like it
i'm not Kapp
i don't even remember if i ended up getting past it
i don't think i did
I like the bullets as a setup, but walling the player like that is a bit dubiuous from a game design perspective.
nowadays I might add some water below as a slow route to skip the setup.
too bad I'm not building a pit hack atm.
*non-puzzle pit hack
you should add water to skip The Shelljump :)
you're making the end
imagine putting down a romhack because you aren’t having fun
am I the only one that thinks the triple shell jump in cataclysm is not that bad?
somehow I remember that doing one shell jump in the first room without pausing was worse...
wait if you don't think it's the worst where'd that actually came from then
in room 1 for the first shell jump before the corner clip, you need a weird x-acceleration pattern to do it no-pause.
idk i feel like i got the impression that the shell jump is really bad from you primarily
didn't Noise really struggle with the triple shell jump?
huh
i thought noise copied inputs from the provided clear?
well if it's not the shell jump what do you think the hardest part of cataclysm is?
having to learn TAS cape Kapp
huh
yeah fair
i guess difficulty is difficult to describe in pit hacks anyway
me?
ohh
nah i re-recorded after the shell section where it actually deviated
i did not play that
worrying
"you have to realize what you need to optimize for" is like >90% of pit hack setup.
"is not falling asleep enough" LUL next time somebody is failing a pit hack setup I'll tell them not to fall asleep.
Can’t stay long, hope everything’s well.
*me, having never played tas cape*
what could possibly go wrong
v1.2 is what went wrong.
now you actually have to cape.
gg
gg
awful
if i ever play cataclysm i should play on 1.0, got it
nice smw F jump
now you know the jump twice.
glad that the chucks get space helmets
good ol' tool assisted mindset of "how can I save an extra item".
circle18Hi
yo Circle gc7Love
PrideHeyyy greg
gg
gg

gg

gg
Gg
what interesting thing?
oh?
"getting stuck in the cave with HF" the newest rage game.
I found the new cape stuff to be pretty chill
lol
p-switch, my favorite cape move.

it me
it them
gl caping :)
p-speed on 4 tiles fan
escaping from l'extra shell.
its not 50:50 - just pick better frames :D

and there is a pause strat
metronome strats

no I think you want to fly through the 2 high tunnel.

instant rejection
gg
mushroom H
you want to get rid of sprites, not spawn new ones with the lava hf
I gtg, have a good night.
lol :D

*midflight
thats fair
yeah just activate it mario - its right in your hand
out of curiosity, why did you pick this up?
that sounds cool
cape haha
the amount of people that are good at cape is quite limited
never say never - we all started somewhere
wait does this hack has turn around patch?
hot take: mod capes difficulty is overrated
yes and no

but i don't like the turn around patch

sticky turnaround for instance
yeah cape rta is like an rhythm game
its fun i like it

got*

yeah, rta is nice

damn if only all of that made some sense
we are missing pit stuff, come on hf cataclysm 2 needs to see the light of the day lol

oh
i was working in a pit hack but its complicated, lack of time

and yes, a short pit hack like 5/7 minutes long
i will never make something again for 30 min of tas
i know how i'm going to play it
by staring at LM for 50 hours and then giving up, probably
fair
do you want a small hint?
ill keep my mouth shut
